no. of videos in 2024: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE timestamp >= '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' AND timestamp < '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'
average views in united states: SELECT AVG(views) AS avg_views FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE region = 'US'
which countries are watching our videos: SELECT region, SUM(views) AS sum_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC
which region has the most views?: SELECT region, SUM(views) AS sum_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC
